pain_points: Core network split-brain conditions and signaling storms
Rogue network attempts, SS7 attacks, and international roaming configuration errors
Radio equipment failure and cell tower handoff cascade failures
Extended outages increasing customer churn probability
Dropped calls during mobility and interrupted data sessions
MME software bugs, memory leaks, and resource exhaustion
Service downtime leading to revenue loss and SLA violations
HSS database corruption or synchronization issues affecting subscriber authentication
use_cases: Detect anomalous IMSI influx for security threats
Detect mass authentication failures from HSS problems
Proactive alerting before help desk is overwhelmed
Detect security attacks and roaming misconfigurations
Monitor multi-dimensional MME problems across lag periods
Identify core network split-brain and signaling storms
Monitor 4G and 5G network infrastructure for issues
Analyze cell ID spike patterns for infrastructure failures
Monitor MME software bugs and resource exhaustion
Identify cell tower handoff cascade failures
customer_context.scale: 500+ unique subscribers affected per incident, 2-5 MME hosts, 50+ unique cell IDs
metrics: Cell spike detection (>50 for lag 1, >25 for lag 2)
Cell ID change rate (lag 1 and lag 2)
IMSI spike detection (>400 for lag 1, >280 for lag 2)
